documents.title: Radiation: Time, Distance, Shielding
documents.content: Core radiation protection principles are time, distance, and shielding: reduce exposure time, increase distance from sources, and use dense shielding such as concrete or packed earth. Shelter plans should be prepared before emergencies and include food, water, and sanitation for sustained indoor stay.

documents.title: Fallout Decontamination
documents.content: If potentially contaminated, remove outer clothing before entering clean shelter areas, bag contaminated items, and wash exposed skin and hair with soap and water. Avoid skin abrasion while washing. Keep clean and dirty zones physically separated to reduce secondary contamination.

documents.title: Potassium Iodide (KI) Scope
documents.content: KI helps block thyroid uptake of radioactive iodine only. It does not protect against many other radionuclides or external radiation. Use only according to trusted public-health or radiation-authority guidance and dosage recommendations.

documents.title: Biological Threat Isolation
documents.content: Use layered infection control: isolate symptomatic individuals, improve ventilation, reduce crowding, enforce hand hygiene, and disinfect high-touch surfaces. Keep simple symptom logs to detect spread early and separate caregiver workflows from food and water tasks.

documents.title: Chemical Exposure Indicators
documents.content: Potential indicators include sudden unexplained symptoms in multiple people, unusual odors, visible aerosols or droplets, and distressed wildlife. Move away from source area, favor fresh air and elevation when appropriate, and avoid direct contact with unknown residues.

documents.title: Household Decontamination Limitations
documents.content: Household bleach is useful for many surface disinfection tasks but concentration, contact time, and material compatibility matter. Never mix bleach with ammonia or acids. For serious CBRN incidents, improvised methods are limited; prioritize evacuation, isolation, and official hazard guidance when available.
